markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the optimization workflow and UI for the Content OS product.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Optimization Framework:** Defined a framework for surfacing optimization tasks, classifying pages into three action-oriented buckets: `Fix Now` (critical issues), `Unrealized Potential` (growth opportunities), and `Dead Zone` (pages to delete or replace).](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8712.0)
  - [**UI Shift to Action:** The UI will shift from a data-heavy table requiring user filters to an opinionated, action-oriented heads-up display. This surfaces the most urgent work first, reducing user effort and preventing critical issues from being missed.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8712.0)
  - [**March Scope Refocus:** The March release will prioritize building the data foundation for this new framework. This requires cutting complex UI features (e.g., advanced sorting, pagination) to focus engineering effort on the core logic and data model.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=9989.0)
  - [**Ryan Singer's Role:** Ryan Singer's involvement is a high-leverage multiplier, accelerating product strategy and design. A formal, long-term engagement (e.g., monthly sessions, equity) was proposed to secure this strategic support.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=10536.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Overwhelming Data & Inaction

  - [Current dashboards present raw data (e.g., 700+ pages, declining traffic) without clear prioritization, leading to analysis paralysis and missed opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=7125.0)
  - [The goal is to translate expert judgment into software, creating an opinionated system that tells users what to do, not just what the data is.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8820.0)

### Solution: An Action-Oriented Optimization Framework

  - [The team defined a framework to classify pages based on their health and potential, creating clear, actionable work items.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8712.0)
  - [**1. `Fix Now` (Critical Alerts)**](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8712.0)
      - [**What:** High-impact pages with severe issues that require immediate attention.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8223.0)
      - [**Why:** To prevent or reverse significant traffic/revenue loss.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=7310.0)
      - [**Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=7310.0)
          - [A major traffic driver's performance has dropped into "free fall."](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=7310.0)
          - [A high-impact page has a broken link, factual inaccuracy, or violates a critical style guide rule.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=3872.0)
  - [**2. `Unrealized Potential` (Growth Opportunities)**](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8640.0)
      - [**What:** Pages with clear opportunities to improve performance.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8640.0)
      - [**Why:** To capture untapped growth.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8640.0)
      - [**Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=7310.0)
          - [A page gets impressions but zero clicks (promise is off).](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=6312.0)
          - [A page is "almost there" (e.g., on page 2 of search results).](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=7392.0)
          - [A page is stale and needs a refresh to maintain relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=3745.0)
  - [**3. `Dead Zone` (Pruning & Refactoring)**](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=4943.0)
      - [**What:** Pages that are low-value and need to be removed or completely overhauled.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=4943.0)
      - [**Why:** To improve overall site quality and focus crawl budget on high-performing content.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=4443.0)
      - [**Action:** Requires human judgment to decide between:](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=4943.0)
          - [**`Rip & Replace`:** Overhaul content on a URL with existing equity (e.g., backlinks).](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=4284.0)
          - [**`Prune & Redirect`:** Delete content with no equity and redirect its URL.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=4380.0)

### UI Strategy: From Data to Action

  - [The UI will be redesigned around this framework, shifting from a generic data table to an action-oriented heads-up display.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8712.0)
  - [**New Structure:** The `Learn & Improve` section will be organized into three distinct, collapsible buckets: `Fix Now`, `Unrealized Potential`, and `Dead Zone`.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=8712.0)
  - [**Nesting:** Content clusters (e.g., by topic, content type) will be nested *inside* each signal bucket. This allows users to understand patterns within the most urgent work (e.g., "Why are *these* pricing pages in free fall?").](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=9686.0)
  - [**March Scope:** To enable this shift, the team will cut complex UI features (e.g., advanced sorting, pagination) from the March release. This focuses effort on building the core data model and logic for the new framework, which is the most critical component.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=9989.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Daniel:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=9989.0)
      - [Revise the March scope to prioritize building the data foundation for the new optimization framework.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=9989.0)
      - [Cut complex UI features (e.g., advanced sorting, pagination) from the March release.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=9989.0)
      - [Implement the new UI structure with `Fix Now`, `Unrealized Potential`, and `Dead Zone` buckets, using nested clustering.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=9650.0)
  - [**Ryan Singer:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=10536.0)
      - [Confirm availability for future sessions by **Wednesday, Feb 28th**.](https://fathom.video/share/5DzpxHN258hc4_s8dWeePqsKVzvF9i6c?tab=summary&timestamp=10846.0)
